title: Strata #16 — Crimson Fault Territory
summary: A vertical abstract painting from the Strata 2026 series, built around a dark crimson field crossed by fine incised white fault lines. Small suspended geometric forms appear within the surface, creating depth, tension and a nocturnal sense of territory.
concept: In Strata #16 — Crimson Fault Territory, the red field becomes a dense geological and psychological space. The incised lines cross the painting like fractures, routes or strata under pressure, while the small blocks appear as markers within a shifting terrain. The work suggests a territory charged with silence, depth and internal movement.
commercial_note: This work belongs to the Strata 2026 series, focused on abstract territory, fault lines, monolithic forms and tectonic tension. Its deep crimson palette gives the painting a dramatic and immersive presence, suitable for collectors seeking a strong contemporary abstract work with intensity, atmosphere and architectural depth.
